memory_candidates.title: Run agent-checkin.js before any non-trivial work in the FAMtastic repo
memory_candidates.body: Standing rule (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md): node scripts/agent-checkin.js --intent "<short>" before scaffolding new systems. Surfaces overlapping in-flight work to prevent the parallel-implementation problem.

memory_candidates.title: agent-checkin keyword overlap is too coarse — flags merged branches as conflicts
memory_candidates.body: 2026-05-05 audit: agent-checkin --intent "Plan closeout mechanism" flagged 7 branches as overlap based on generic keyword presence (plan, script, schema). All 7 were merged or stale. Need per-branch staleness check (already-merged? abandoned?) before flagging.
